question: How far is the parking facility from the airport?
context: Located just 1 kilometer walking distance from the KRK Airport terminal, our parking facility is one of the closest off-site options available. For those who prefer not to walk or are traveling with heavy luggage, we offer a complimentary shuttle service.
answer: The parking is about 1 km from the airport terminal, roughly a 12-15 minute walk.
reference_answer: The facility is 1 kilometer from the KRK Airport terminal, approximately 12-15 minutes on foot. A free shuttle is also available for those who prefer not to walk.

question: Is there a free shuttle to the airport?
context: We provide a free shuttle bus service running between our parking facility and the airport terminal. Available 24/7 for all customers. Runs every 15-20 minutes during peak hours (4:00 AM - 10:00 PM). Runs every 30 minutes during night hours (10:00 PM - 4:00 AM). Journey time: approximately 3-5 minutes.
answer: No, the shuttle service is not free. It costs €5 per person.
reference_answer: Yes, a free shuttle bus runs 24/7 between the facility and the airport terminal. During peak hours (4:00 AM – 10:00 PM) it departs every 15-20 minutes; during night hours (10:00 PM – 4:00 AM) every 30 minutes. The journey takes 3-5 minutes.

question: What is the cancellation policy if I cancel 3 days before my arrival?
context: Cancel more than 48 hours before scheduled arrival: 100% refund processed within 5-7 business days. No questions asked.
answer: If you cancel more than 48 hours before arrival, you receive a full 100% refund.
reference_answer: Cancelling more than 48 hours before your scheduled arrival entitles you to a full 100% refund, processed within 5-7 business days, with no questions asked.

question: What are the available parking price tiers?
context: Standard Uncovered Parking: Spaces #1-60, starting from €5/day. Premium Uncovered Parking: Spaces #61-80, located closest to the shuttle pickup point, starting from €15/day. Covered Parking: Spaces #81-100, protected from weather with additional security, starting from €30/day.
answer: There are three tiers: Standard Uncovered from €5/day, Premium Uncovered from €15/day, and Covered Parking from €30/day.
reference_answer: The facility offers three pricing tiers: Standard Uncovered (spaces #1–60) from €5/day, Premium Uncovered (spaces #61–80, closest to shuttle pickup) from €15/day, and Covered Parking (spaces #81–100, weather-protected with extra security) from €30/day.

question: What is the maximum vehicle size allowed?
context: Maximum Length: 5.0 meters. Maximum Width: 2.0 meters. Maximum Height: 2.1 meters. We cannot accommodate vans, SUVs larger than the specified dimensions, minibuses, trucks, camper vans, or commercial vehicles.
answer: Vehicles must be no longer than 5 meters, no wider than 2 meters, and no taller than 2.1 meters. Large SUVs, vans, and trucks are not accepted.
reference_answer: The maximum allowed dimensions are: length 5.0 m, width 2.0 m, height 2.1 m. Vans, oversized SUVs, minibuses, trucks, camper vans, and commercial vehicles are not accepted.

question: Can I book a parking spot on the same day?
context: Can I book same-day parking? Yes, subject to availability. We recommend calling us first at +48 12 345 6789 to confirm space availability.
answer: Yes, same-day bookings are possible but subject to availability. It's recommended to call ahead to confirm.
reference_answer: Yes, same-day parking is available subject to availability. It is recommended to call +48 12 345 6789 first to confirm a free space before arriving.

question: How do I enter the parking facility when I arrive?
context: Drive up to the yellow automatic barrier. Have your QR code ready (from confirmation email/SMS). Option A: Scan QR code at the reader (barrier opens automatically). Option B: Press the call button - our staff will verify your booking and open the barrier. Option C: Enter your booking reference number on the keypad.
answer: On arrival, drive to the yellow automatic barrier and scan your QR code from the confirmation email. Alternatively, press the call button or enter your booking reference on the keypad.
reference_answer: Drive to the yellow automatic barrier and use one of three options: scan your QR code at the reader for automatic entry, press the call button so staff can verify your booking, or enter your booking reference number on the keypad.

question: Is covered parking available, and what are the benefits?
context: Covered Parking: Spaces #81-100. Protected from weather (rain, snow, sun). Additional security with restricted access. Premium service with priority shuttle. Starting from €30/day. Benefits include no ice scraping in winter, vehicle stays cooler in summer, and UV protection for the vehicle's paint.
answer: Covered parking (spaces #81-100) starts at €30/day and protects your car from rain, snow, and sun. It also includes priority shuttle access.
reference_answer: Yes, covered parking is available in spaces #81–100 starting from €30/day. Benefits include protection from rain, snow, and sun, no ice scraping in winter, a cooler car in summer, UV paint protection, restricted access for added security, and priority shuttle boarding.

question: What are the facility's operating hours?
context: Our facility and staff operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year - including all Polish holidays. You can drop off or collect your vehicle at any time that suits your travel schedule.
answer: The facility operates 24/7, 365 days a year, including all public holidays.
reference_answer: The facility and staff operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year, including all Polish public holidays. You may drop off or collect your vehicle at any time.

question: What happens if I stay longer than my originally booked period?
context: Extra days will be charged at the standard daily rate for your parking type. Payment due at checkout. Subject to space availability during peak season. Overstay Fees: First 6 hours over booked period: Free grace period. After 6 hours: Charged as a full additional day. We'll send an SMS/email reminder on your scheduled checkout day.
answer: There is a 6-hour grace period for overstays. After that, each additional day is charged at your parking type's standard daily rate, payable at checkout.
reference_answer: A 6-hour grace period applies at no extra cost. Beyond that, a full additional day is charged at your parking type's standard daily rate, paid at checkout. During peak season your vehicle may be relocated if space is limited. You'll receive an SMS/email reminder on your scheduled checkout day.
